title: Field Lines, Repetition, Combination, Structured Fields, and Limits · Language Lens: Hop Field Connection Options
summary: A parser stores one value per name, splits every comma, accepts obsolete folding, merges Set-Cookie, and treats all field values as trusted UTF-8 text. Planned artifact: Add and verify the hop field connection options increment in loss-aware bounded field-section model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Parse Connection options and nominate hop-by-hop fields dynamically instead of relying only on a fixed list.
Preserve field-line order and repeated values, combining only when that field definition permits it.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
